_doc: Frozen Route-A (Z-only source-anchored certificate) manifest for the real-EEG validation (pre-reg v4). DRY-RUN package only. Route A is evaluated as a TRANSFER TEST of the historical A-negative; it is NOT required to fail. Method locks are byte-unchanged from the dee8958 line.
framing: transfer test of the synthetic A-negative; unexpected good behavior on real-feature injections is a FINDING, not a protocol violation; it never changes any B3 claim.

code_provenance.expected_tag_ref: PLACEHOLDER refs/tags/csc-realeeg-v1 (tag NOT created in this dry-run package)
code_provenance.method_lock_note: Route-A method byte-unchanged from the synthetic frozen A line (tag csc-confirmatory-v1 / dee8958); the runner verifies these hashes before any execute.

statistics.b_certifier_internal_null: A uses a parametric bootstrap under the fitted h0 (condition on (Z,D), resample Y*); its internal bootstrap count is the frozen A-method default, not changed for real EEG
statistics.denominator_rule: false-confirmation rate over VALID cohorts only (test actually ran); invalid/abstain (INVALID/UNIDENTIFIABLE/NEED_MORE) reported SEPARATELY and never pad the type-I denominator; above the invalid cap the cohort family is NON-ESTIMABLE (INCONCLUSIVE), not PASS.

endpoints.R1_type_I_gating: on NULL_cov: subject-clustered bootstrap (B_subject) upper bound on false-confirmation rate <= family 0.05; per-cohort decision at alpha_budget 0.025
endpoints.R1b_gating_controls: NULL_label, NULL_cov_plus_label, and random_label_control also gated <= 0.05 (label-shift trap + random-label sanity controls)
endpoints.R3_guards_gating: eligibility (>=20 eligible paired subjects, both sessions, both classes) -- gates BOTH routes (shared cache)
endpoints.R2_power_reported_not_gating: on POS_concept / POS_concept_plus_cov: confirmation rate reported (A expected low = transfer of the negative); NOT a gate
endpoints.R5_stability_gating: R1 replicates under Lee2019 subject-bootstrap / leave-k-subjects-out; 2b/tangent-space robustness-only (NOT gating)

verdict_rules.PASS: all gating endpoints (R1, R1b, R3, R5) hold AND red-team reproduces them
verdict_rules.FAIL: any gating endpoint fails (an honest negative; reported, not retried; no feature/montage change)
verdict_rules.INCONCLUSIVE: invalid/abstain fraction above cap, or < min eligible paired subjects, or cache hash mismatch
verdict_rules.note: PASS asserts type-I control on constructed real-feature nulls; it does NOT validate any genuine real verdict, does NOT report power as a claim, and makes no clinical/PD claim.
